canonical_answer: A black hot glue gun with a yellow trigger rests on a white table near a coil of brown twine. Three small nail polish bottles in red, dark red, and white stand upright in the background. A hand holds a brown pinecone steady while another hand uses a brush to apply red glitter polish directly onto the textured scales.

question: Describe the sequence of visual scenes from the opening title card to the final table setup.
canonical_answer: At 0s, black text reading Lay appears on a white background; at 2s, clusters of small photographs with film borders appear next to the text; at 4s, a pinecone with white tips hangs from a green branch; at 12s, a pinecone ornament with red glitter tips is suspended by white twine; at 18s, a black hot glue gun sits on a table near paint bottles.

question: Detail the specific ornaments and crafting tools shown throughout the video timeline.
canonical_answer: At 4s, gold beaded garland is visible on the left side of the tree; at 12s, warm white string lights glow among the green artificial needles; at 14s, the camera focus shifts slightly causing the background to blur; at 16s, a second pinecone ornament with natural brown lower scales is shown; at 18s, three brown pinecones rest on a table behind a coil of twine.
